meta_description: Prepare your hair for holiday travel with Studio One's expert guide. Learn packing essentials, protective hairstyles, and frizz-prevention tips for extensions.
author: Studio One Fresno
body_text:
How to Prep Your Hair for Holiday Travel

Holiday travel can damage hair—especially extensions. Airplane cabins are dry, hotel water can be harsh, and winter weather causes frizz. With proper preparation, you can maintain smooth, voluminous, and flawless hair throughout your trip.

Holiday Hair Travel Essentials: What to Pack

Pack strategically for hair protection. Studio One offers Holiday Travel Packs containing regular-size texture spray, travel-size texture spray, and travel-size dry shampoo.

Texture spray is essential for extension wearers, providing volume and support to revive styles after flights, hats, or busy days. Additional must-pack items include:

- Dry shampoo: Refreshes roots and extends style longevity
- Texture spray: Adds body and maintains style bounce
- Hydrating conditioner or mask: Replenishes moisture lost during travel
- Lightweight oil: Keeps ends smooth and prevents tangling
- Detangling brush: Essential for protecting extension rows
- Heat protectant: Always necessary, even on vacation

Best Hairstyles for Traveling

Holiday travel requires protective hairstyles that safeguard extensions while maintaining comfort.

Low Loose Braid: Prevents tangles without creating harsh bends.

Low Bun: Keeps hair tidy and protected during long flights or drives.

Half-Up Clip: A cute, low-tension option that keeps hair off the face.

Silk-Friendly Pony: Using a silk scrunchie prevents damage and creasing.

How to Stop Hair From Frizzing on Holiday

Frizz is the primary holiday hair concern. Combat it with these strategies:

Hydrate Before You Go: Moisturizing conditioner or mask prepares hair for changing climates.

Travel With Silk: A silk pillowcase or scarf reduces friction and keeps extensions frizz-free.

Brush Regularly: Brushing distributes natural oils and keeps the cuticle smooth.

Avoid Overwashing: Overwashing dries hair. Use travel-size dry shampoo instead.

Seal Your Ends: Oil eliminates flyaways and protects from dryness.

Have a Gorgeous Holiday — Book Your Pre-Travel Appointment

Start your trip with fresh color, smooth ends, and perfectly maintained extensions. Holiday travel feels better when your hair is vacation-ready.

Book now at https://www.studioonefresno.com/booking
